info.title: Atomic API
info.description: REST API for the Atomic knowledge base

201.description: Token created (includes raw token — save it, won't be shown again)

parameters.name: parent_id
parameters.description: Parent node ID (null for root level)

200.description: List of databases with active ID
Number of atoms queued for embedding
Number of atoms queued for tagging
Whether an AI provider is configured

tag_id.description: Tag ID to add to scope

ApiTokenInfo.description: Token metadata returned to callers (never contains the raw token or hash)

AtomPosition.description: Position of an atom on the canvas

AtomSummary.description: Lightweight atom summary for paginated list views (no full content)

AtomWithEmbedding.description: Atom with its average embedding vector for similarity calculations

BreadcrumbEntry.description: Entry in the breadcrumb navigation trail

BulkCreateResult.description: Result struct for bulk atom creation

CanvasEdge.description: An edge between two nodes at the same level

CanvasLevel.description: A single level in the hierarchical canvas, returned by get_canvas_level()

children_hint.description: Hint for which children to include

CanvasNode.description: A node in the hierarchical canvas view

CanvasNodeType.description: Type of node in the hierarchical canvas view

ChatMessageWithContext.description: Message with tool calls and citations

ConversationWithTags.description: Conversation with its tag scope and summary info

tag_ids.description: Tag IDs to scope the conversation

tag_name.description: Tag name for the wiki article

max_notes.description: Max notes to import (all if not set)

tag_ids.description: Tag IDs to assign to ingested atom

NeighborhoodAtom.description: Atom in a neighborhood graph with depth info

NeighborhoodEdge.description: Edge in a neighborhood graph (combines tag and semantic connections)

NeighborhoodGraph.description: Neighborhood graph for local graph view

next_cursor.description: Cursor for keyset pagination: updated_at of the last item

next_cursor_id.description: Cursor tiebreaker: id of the last item

RelatedTag.description: Tag related to another tag by semantic connectivity

SemanticEdge.description: Pre-computed semantic edge between two atoms

tag_ids.description: Tag IDs for the conversation scope

SimilarAtomResult.description: Result struct for similar atom search

SourceInfo.description: Source with atom count for filter dropdown

SuggestedArticle.description: Suggested wiki article for tags that don't have articles yet

tag_ids.description: Updated tag IDs (if provided, replaces all tags)

WikiArticleStatus.description: Status of a wiki article for quick checks

WikiArticleSummary.description: Summary of a wiki article for list view (includes tag name)

WikiArticleVersion.description: Archived version of a wiki article

WikiArticleWithCitations.description: Wiki article with all its citations

WikiCitation.description: Citation linking article content to source atom/chunk

WikiLink.description: Inter-article wiki link (cross-reference between wiki articles)

WikiVersionSummary.description: Summary of a wiki article version for list views

servers.description: Local server (replace with your instance URL)
